texto: What’s it like being a writer? Mostly it’s like being a child surrounded by adults. My friends have grown-up careers. They balance spreadsheets, analyze data, negotiate deals. They build things, heal patients, teach children. Meanwhile, I’m over here saying “Let’s pretend.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jennifer Froelich: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amizade. O trecho “What’s it like being a writer? Mostly it’s like being a child surrounded by adults. My friends ha…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, writer, writing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e writing.
